/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Not claimed by any route, alias, or redirect. Parent /admin/content/media is entity.media.collection but the /scheduled child is unrouted (ResourceNotFoundException); scheduler module uses /admin/content/scheduled, not this path. Note: it sits under the /admin namespace, so using it as a node alias is operationally inadvisable even though nothing currently claims the exact path.

/admin/content/pages.reason: Claimed. Resolves to route entity.canvas_page.collection (Canvas Pages admin listing, backed by view.canvas_pages.page_1) plus entity.canvas_page.add_page at /admin/content/pages/add. A real existing route owns this path, so a node alias here would be shadowed and is unsafe.

/admin/structure/taxonomy/scheduled.reason: Not claimed by any route, alias, or redirect. Parent /admin/structure/taxonomy is entity.taxonomy_vocabulary.collection but the literal /scheduled child returns ResourceNotFoundException (no wildcard swallows it). Note: it lives under the /admin namespace, so a node alias here is operationally inadvisable, though the exact path is currently unclaimed.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Free. No route matches (ResourceNotFoundException), path.validator reports it is not a valid/routed path, no path_alias entity has this alias, and no redirect claims it. Available as a new node alias.
